actors.name: User
actors.description: General end user of the Berachain ecosystem. Interacts with dApps, manages tokens, and participates in network activities.
capabilities: Connect wallet to dApps
Check $BERA airdrop allocation
Claim $BERA airdrop tokens
Bridge NFTs between Ethereum and Berachain
Connect to Berachain Mainnet/Testnet RPC
Set up and configure wallet (e.g., MetaMask)
Obtain $BERA via bridging or exchanges
Provide liquidity to protocols (e.g., BEX)
Receive receipt tokens for provided liquidity
Stake PoL-eligible assets/receipt tokens in Reward Vaults
Earn $BGT from Reward Vaults
Claim earned $BGT rewards via BeraHub
Trade/swap crypto assets on BEX
Trade approved stables/assets for $HONEY on Honey Swap
Use BeraHub to review Reward Vaults and Validators
Redeem $BGT for $BERA via BeraHub
Mint $HONEY by depositing whitelisted collateral via HoneySwap/HoneyFactory
Use $HONEY for payments or as a hedge
Pay transaction fees using $BERA
If holding sufficient $BGT, create governance proposals
If holding $BGT, vote on governance proposals
If holding $BGT, delegate $BGT to validators (boost)
Claim incentives earned from boosting validators via BeraHub

actors.name: $BGT Token Holder
actors.description: Holds $BGT tokens, enabling participation in governance and PoL economic incentives.
capabilities: Hold $BGT tokens
Create governance proposals (if meeting 10,000 $BGT threshold)
Vote on governance proposals
Delegate $BGT voting power
Delegate $BGT to validators to boost their emissions and earn incentives
Redeem $BGT for $BERA (one-way)
Earn a share of Berachain core dApp fees (BEX, HoneySwap) if boosting validators

actors.name: Guardian
actors.description: Member of a 5-of-9 multisig responsible for oversight of the governance timelock period.
capabilities: Cancel malicious governance proposals during the timelock period
Review Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) proposals (along with BGT Foundation)

actors.name: Validator
actors.description: Network participant responsible for proposing blocks, participating in consensus, and securing Berachain. Operates a validator node.
capabilities: Stake $BERA (minimum 250,000, maximum 10,000,000 $BERA)
Propose blocks if in the Active Set (top 69 by $BERA stake)
Receive base $BGT emissions for block production
Receive variable $BGT reward vault emissions based on $BGT boost
Direct $BGT emissions to chosen whitelisted Reward Vaults
Receive protocol-provided Incentives from Reward Vaults for directed emissions
Collect transaction fees ($BERA) from proposed blocks
Set and update commission rate on earned incentives
Share incentives with $BGT delegators (boosters)

actors.name: Protocol Developer / Ecosystem Project
actors.description: Develops applications and protocols on Berachain, potentially integrating with Proof-of-Liquidity.
capabilities: Deploy smart contracts on Berachain
Create Reward Vaults using the factory contract
Submit Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) forms and post on Governance Forum for whitelisting
Offer incentive tokens in their whitelisted Reward Vaults to attract $BGT emissions
Define how users acquire PoL-eligible assets for their protocol

actors.name: Incentive Token Manager
actors.description: A wallet address designated (via governance) to manage the offering of specific incentive tokens for a Reward Vault.
capabilities: Offer whitelisted incentive tokens to a specific Reward Vault
Define the incentive rate (distribution per $BGT)
Deposit additional incentive tokens to the Reward Vault
Increase incentive rate when depositing additional tokens
Set a lower incentive rate only when current incentive supply is exhausted

actors.name: BGT Foundation
actors.description: An entity involved in the governance process, specifically reviewing Reward Vault whitelisting requests.
capabilities: Review Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) proposals weekly

actors.name: Berachain Foundation
actors.description: Organization supporting the Berachain ecosystem's development, R&D, growth, and operations.
capabilities: Support ecosystem development and R&D
Fund growth initiatives and operations
Manage node operator delegations
Drive evolutions of Proof-of-Liquidity and BeaconKit
Manage a portion of $BERA supply for ecosystem growth, developer tooling, liquidity provisioning

actors.name: Big Bera Labs Member / Initial Core Contributor
actors.description: Individuals who are core contributors to the Berachain blockchain, including advisors.
capabilities: Receive allocated $BERA tokens subject to vesting schedule

actors.name: Investor
actors.description: Seed, Series A, or Series B investor in Berachain.
capabilities: Receive allocated $BERA tokens subject to vesting schedule

actors.name: Social Media Platform User
actors.description: User interacting with Berachain through social media channels, particularly for airdrop participation.
capabilities: Connect relevant social media accounts for airdrop allocation checking
Tie social airdrop allocations to a wallet via social login

assets.name: $BERA Token
assets.description: Native gas and staking token of Berachain. Used for transaction fees and validator staking.

assets.name: $BGT (Bera Governance Token)
assets.description: Non-transferrable staking and governance token. Earned by participating in Proof-of-Liquidity. Used for governance voting, validator boosting, and can be redeemed for $BERA.

assets.name: $HONEY Token
assets.description: Native stablecoin of the Berachain ecosystem, soft-pegged to the US Dollar. Fully collateralized.

assets.name: Official Berachain NFTs
assets.description: Six official NFT collections (Bong Bears, Bond Bears, Boo Bears, Baby Bears, Band Bears, Bit Bears) that can be bridged from Ethereum to Berachain.

assets.name: Ecosystem NFTs
assets.description: NFTs from the Berachain ecosystem, holders of which may be eligible for airdrops.

assets.name: User Private Keys
assets.description: Cryptographic keys stored in user wallets, granting access to their assets on Berachain.

assets.name: Voting Power
assets.description: The ability to influence governance decisions, derived from holding or being delegated $BGT.

assets.name: Receipt Tokens (PoL-eligible assets)
assets.description: Tokens received by users as proof of contribution to a protocol (e.g., LP tokens from BEX). These can be staked in Reward Vaults to earn $BGT.

assets.name: Incentive Tokens
assets.description: Whitelisted ERC20 tokens offered by protocols in Reward Vaults to attract validator $BGT emissions. Earned by validators and their $BGT delegators.

assets.name: Liquidity
assets.description: Crypto assets provided by users to liquidity pools in DEXs (like BEX) or other DeFi protocols.

assets.name: Whitelisted Collateral Assets for $HONEY
assets.description: Approved tokens (e.g., $USDC, $BYUSD) that can be deposited to mint $HONEY.

assets.name: $HONEY Vault Shares
assets.description: Shares representing a user's deposited collateral in a specific $HONEY Vault, custodied by HoneyFactory.

assets.name: Proofs of Entitlement for Incentives
assets.description: Data used by users (boosters) to claim their earned incentive tokens, managed by a backend API and BGTIncentiveDistributor contract.

assets.name: Transaction Fees
assets.description: Fees paid in $BERA for network transactions, partly burned and partly earned by validators.

assets.name: dApp Fees
assets.description: Fees collected from Berachain core dApps (BEX, HoneySwap) and distributed to $BGT holders who boost validators, via FeeCollector contract.

assets.name: $BERA Airdrop Allocation
assets.description: Amount of $BERA tokens allocated to a user during an airdrop event.

components.name: Berachain Network
components.description: The Layer 1 blockchain itself, including its consensus and execution layers.

components.name: Airdrop Checker Website
components.description: Website (checker.berachain.com) allowing users to check their $BERA airdrop allocation.

components.name: Airdrop Claim Website
components.description: Website (airdrop.berachain.com) allowing users to claim their allocated $BERA tokens.

components.name: Ethereum Mainnet
components.description: External blockchain where official Berachain NFTs originate and can be bridged from.

components.name: Berachain Governance System
components.description: Decentralized system (derived from OpenZeppelin Governance) for proposals, voting, and execution of changes. Manages the governance lifecycle.

components.name: BeraHub
components.description: Central dApp (hub.berachain.com) for managing $BGT, accessing BEX liquidity, participating in governance, claiming rewards, and other Berachain interactions.

components.name: Governance Contract
components.description: Smart contract used to submit governance proposals on-chain.

components.name: Timelock Contract
components.description: Smart contract that imposes a delay on the execution of passed governance proposals, allowing for Guardian oversight.

components.name: Berachain NFT Bridge
components.description: Service (nftbridge.berachain.com) for bridging official Berachain NFTs between Ethereum and Berachain.

components.name: Blockchain Wallet
components.description: User-controlled software (e.g., MetaMask) for storing private keys and interacting with Berachain dApps.

components.name: Berachain Mainnet RPC Endpoint
components.description: Remote Procedure Call endpoint for wallets and applications to interact with the Berachain Mainnet.

components.name: Canonical Bridging Service (Berachain Bridge)
components.description: Official bridge (bridge.berachain.com, powered by LayerZero) for transferring tokens to Berachain, with an option to get $BERA.

components.name: Centralized Exchange (CEX)
components.description: Off-chain trading platform where $BERA may be listed and traded.

components.name: Proof-of-Liquidity (PoL) Mechanism
components.description: Core consensus and economic mechanism of Berachain, involving $BERA staking, $BGT emissions, Reward Vaults, and incentives.

components.name: Reward Vault Contract
components.description: Smart contract where users stake PoL-eligible assets (receipt tokens) to earn $BGT rewards. Receives $BGT emissions from validators and can offer incentives.

components.name: BEX (Berachain Exchange)
components.description: Berachain's native decentralized exchange (DEX) for swapping crypto assets and providing liquidity.

components.name: BEX Liquidity Pool
components.description: Smart contract within BEX holding pairs of crypto assets, enabling swaps and liquidity provision.

components.name: BeaconKit
components.description: Modular consensus layer framework used by Berachain, integrating CometBFT for EVM-compatible chains.

components.name: CometBFT
components.description: Consensus algorithm used by BeaconKit to achieve agreement on block order and validity.

components.name: EVM Execution Client
components.description: Software (e.g., Geth, Reth) responsible for executing smart contracts and processing transactions on Berachain.

components.name: Engine API
components.description: Interface enabling communication between the consensus layer (BeaconKit) and the execution layer (EVM Execution Client).

components.name: Honey Swap dApp
components.description: Berachain dApp (honey.berachain.com) for trading approved stables/assets for $HONEY and minting $HONEY.

components.name: Governance Forum
components.description: Online forum (hub.forum.berachain.com) for discussing governance proposals, including Reward Vault whitelisting.

components.name: BGTIncentiveDistributor Contract
components.description: Smart contract responsible for managing the distribution and claiming of incentive tokens earned by users who boost validators.

components.name: Incentive Distribution Backend API
components.description: Off-chain service that updates proofs of users' entitlement to incentive tokens every 24 hours for the BGTIncentiveDistributor.

components.name: Distributor Contract (PoL)
components.description: Smart contract that emits $BGT to Reward Vaults on a per-block basis as part of the PoL mechanism.

components.name: BlockRewardController Contract
components.description: On-chain contract holding constants for $BGT block reward emissions.

components.name: Auto-Incentivizer
components.description: System that uses fees from foundation vaults to automatically offer incentives to Reward Vaults.

components.name: Foundation Vaults (PoL)
components.description: Specific vaults whose fees are used by the Auto-Incentivizer.

components.name: Reward Vault Factory Contract
components.description: Smart contract used by ecosystem projects to create new Reward Vaults.

components.name: FeeCollector Contract
components.description: Smart contract that auctions fees collected from core dApps (BEX, HoneySwap) for $WBERA and distributes them to $BGT holders who have boosted validators.

components.name: $HONEY Vault Contract
components.description: Specialized smart contract for a specific type of whitelisted collateral, used in the $HONEY minting process. Manages deposits of that collateral.

components.name: HoneyFactory Contract
components.description: Central smart contract in the $HONEY minting process. Connects $HONEY Vaults, custodies vault shares, and mints $HONEY tokens to users.

components.name: Social Media Platform
components.description: External social media service (e.g. Discord, Twitter) used for community interaction and airdrop announcements/participation.

components.name: Berachain Bepolia Testnet RPC
components.description: Remote Procedure Call endpoint for wallets and applications to interact with the Berachain Bepolia Testnet.

components.name: BeraScan Block Explorer
components.description: Block explorer for Berachain (berascan.com).

components.name: Boyco
components.description: Platform for developers and builders related to Berachain ecosystem support (boyco.berachain.com).

components.name: RFRV Google Form (BEX Pool)
components.description: Google Form (tinyurl.com/bdebbjkb) for submitting Request for Reward Vault for BEX Pools.

components.name: RFRV Google Form (General non-BEX)
components.description: Google Form (tinyurl.com/3kzv8de7) for submitting Request for Reward Vault for general non-BEX integrations.

components.name: OpenSea
components.description: NFT marketplace (opensea.io) where official Berachain NFT collections are listed on Ethereum.

components.name: Berachain Discord
components.description: Official Berachain Discord server for community questions and discussion.

components.name: Berachain Blog
components.description: Official Berachain Blog (blog.berachain.com) for announcements and information.

data_flows.data: $BERA airdrop claim request, wallet connection, transaction approval
data_flows.description: User claims $BERA tokens from the airdrop website.
User with sufficient $BGT submits a governance proposal.

data_flows.data: Vote on a governance proposal (via BeraHub)
data_flows.description: $BGT holder casts their vote.

data_flows.data: Signal to cancel a malicious proposal
data_flows.description: Guardian cancels a proposal during timelock.

data_flows.data: NFT bridge request (from Ethereum to Berachain)
data_flows.description: User bridges their official Berachain NFTs.
Validator stakes $BERA to participate in consensus.
Distributor contract sends $BGT emissions to a Reward Vault based on validator's direction.
User provides liquidity to a BEX liquidity pool.
BEX liquidity pool issues LP tokens to the liquidity provider.
User stakes their receipt tokens (e.g., LP tokens) into a Reward Vault.
User claims earned $BGT from a Reward Vault via BeraHub.
$BGT Holder delegates $BGT to a validator, influencing their boost.
User trades assets for $HONEY on Honey Swap dApp.

data_flows.data: Incentive token deposit and rate configuration (via BeraHub)
data_flows.description: Incentive Token Manager adds/configures incentives for a Reward Vault.

data_flows.data: Claim incentive tokens request with proof (via BeraHub)
data_flows.description: User claims their earned share of incentives from boosting a validator.

data_flows.data: Whitelisted collateral deposit for $HONEY minting (via HoneySwap)
data_flows.description: User deposits collateral into HoneyFactory to mint $HONEY.
HoneyFactory mints $HONEY tokens to the user.
Reward Vault distributes validator's commission share of incentives.
Reward Vault sends remaining incentives to BGTIncentiveDistributor for boosters.
Backend API provides proof to user for claiming incentives.

trust_boundaries.name: User Wallet to dApp Interface
trust_boundaries.description: Boundary between user's private key environment (wallet) and the web interface of a dApp (e.g., BeraHub). User must approve transactions.

trust_boundaries.name: Ethereum-Berachain Bridge
trust_boundaries.description: Boundary separating the Ethereum Mainnet and Berachain, crossed when bridging assets like NFTs or tokens.

trust_boundaries.name: Governance Timelock Execution
trust_boundaries.description: Boundary ensuring a delay and potential for Guardian intervention before a passed governance proposal is executed.

trust_boundaries.name: Off-chain Service to On-chain Contract
trust_boundaries.description: Boundary between an off-chain backend API providing proofs and an on-chain smart contract consuming these proofs for incentive claims.

trust_boundaries.name: External Exchange to Berachain
trust_boundaries.description: Boundary when users acquire $BERA on a CEX and then bridge/transfer it to Berachain. Involves CEX's own security and bridging mechanism.

trust_boundaries.name: Social Platform to Airdrop System
trust_boundaries.description: Boundary where user's social identity is linked to an on-chain wallet for airdrop purposes, relying on OAuth or similar from the social platform.

behaviors.name: User Claims $BERA Airdrop
behaviors.description: User interacts with the Airdrop Claim Website to receive their $BERA token allocation.

behaviors.name: User Creates Governance Proposal
behaviors.action: Call propose function with parameters (via BeraHub)
behaviors.description: A user with sufficient $BGT creates a new governance proposal on-chain.

behaviors.name: $BGT Holder Votes on Proposal
behaviors.description: $BGT holder participates in governance by voting on an active proposal.

behaviors.name: Guardian Cancels Malicious Proposal
behaviors.description: Guardian intervenes to cancel a harmful proposal during its timelock period.

behaviors.name: User Bridges NFTs
behaviors.description: User transfers official Berachain NFTs from Ethereum to Berachain or vice-versa.

behaviors.name: Validator Stakes $BERA
behaviors.description: A prospective or active validator stakes $BERA to secure the network and participate in consensus.

behaviors.name: Validator Directs $BGT Emissions
behaviors.description: Validator directs their earned $BGT emissions to specific whitelisted Reward Vaults.

behaviors.name: User Provides Liquidity to BEX
behaviors.description: User adds liquidity to a BEX liquidity pool and receives LP tokens.

behaviors.name: User Stakes Receipt Tokens in Reward Vault
behaviors.description: User stakes their PoL-eligible receipt tokens to earn $BGT.

behaviors.name: User Boosts Validator with $BGT
behaviors.description: User (as a $BGT Holder) boosts a validator to increase their emissions and earn incentives.

behaviors.name: Incentive Token Manager Adds Incentives
behaviors.action: Deposit incentive tokens and set rate (via BeraHub)
behaviors.description: The designated manager for a Reward Vault's incentive token adds new incentives.

behaviors.name: User Claims Incentives
behaviors.action: Submit proof and claim tokens (via BeraHub)
behaviors.description: User who boosted a validator claims their share of earned incentive tokens.

behaviors.name: User Mints $HONEY
behaviors.description: User deposits whitelisted collateral into the HoneyFactory to mint $HONEY stablecoins.

behaviors.name: Protocol Developer Submits RFRV
behaviors.action: Submit RFRV form and post on Governance Forum
behaviors.description: A protocol developer requests their Reward Vault to be whitelisted.

behaviors.name: User Redeems $BGT for $BERA
behaviors.description: User burns $BGT to receive an equivalent amount of $BERA via BeraHub.

behaviors.name: Validator Proposes Block
behaviors.description: An active validator proposes a new block of transactions to the Berachain network.
